---
title: "Timeline of Hurricanes"
author: "Connor Whalen"
date: "2025-07-20"
output:
  word_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: '3'
  html_document:
    theme: readable
    highlight: textmate
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

Load packages
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ghibli)
library(tidyverse)
```

Set plot aesthetics
```{r}
# color palette -- hurricane = #CB87B4, control = #F4B95A, drought = #D84D16, flood = #1BB6AF
# trem = #c9ad79 , meta = #F66387 , mono = #A6E000 , myxo = #07c4c5
connor_theme <- theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "white"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
        panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "grey30"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "darkgrey"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "grey15"),
        legend.title = element_blank())
```

Load dataframe
```{r}
# actual values
df <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/Chapter1 NOLA/datasets/nola misc analysis - timeline dates.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(start_date = as.Date(start_date)) %>%
  mutate(end_date = as.Date(end_date)) %>% 
  select(start_date, end_date, type, name, category) %>% 
   mutate(
    name = factor(name,
      levels = c("control", 
                 unique(name[name != "control"][order(start_date[name != "control"])])))) %>%
  mutate(
    start_date = case_when(
      type == "pre" ~ start_date, 
      type == "post" ~ NA_Date_, 
      TRUE ~ start_date
    ),
    end_date = case_when(
      type == "pre" ~ NA_Date_,  
      type == "post" ~ end_date, 
      TRUE ~ end_date
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(type = factor(type)) %>%
  group_by(name, type, category) %>%
  summarise(
    min_start = min(start_date, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_end = max(end_date, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    name = factor(name, levels = unique(name)),  # keep name order
    type_offset = case_when(
      type == "6 month" ~ -0.2,
      type == "3 month" ~ 0.2,
      type == "hurricane" ~ 0,
      type == "tropical storm" ~ 0  # you can adjust this if needed
    ),
    y_pos = as.numeric(name) + type_offset
  ) %>%
  mutate(earliest_start = min(min_start, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(name = fct_reorder(name, earliest_start, .desc = TRUE))



```

Make timeline.
```{r}

ggplot(df, aes(x = min_start, y = 1, color = category)) +
  # Segment layer for control periods
  geom_segment(
    data = df %>% filter(type %in% c("6 month", "3 month")),
    aes(xend = max_end, y = 1, yend = 1),
    size = 6,
    alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  # Point layer for storms
  geom_point(
    data = df %>% filter(type %in% c("hurricane", "tropical storm")),
    size = 4,
    alpha = 1
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = seq(as.Date("1965-01-01"), as.Date("2006-01-01"), by = "5 years"),
    date_labels = "%Y"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(NULL, breaks = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "storm" = "#CB87B4",
    "control" = "#F4B95A"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = ""
  ) +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
  )


ggsave("timeline.jpeg", width = 10, height = 2.5)
```
